title: Star Totem
description: A Totem of Undying retextured as a simple amethyst star
body:
**This resource pack replaces the vanilla Totem of Undying with a crystal amethyst star design**
Made at Zilera request (from my Discord server)

=========================
**Compatibility:**
• Minecraft 1.20.-
• Minecraft 1.21.-
=========================
**Custom sound of Totem:**

=========================
### Support & Contact: Love this pack? Support me on [Boosty](https://boosty.to/reterica)!
For any questions or suggestions, reach me out via my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/QsezmMbPQF)
